title: elionurus hirsutus
intro: Elionurus hirsutus, also known as Hairy Elionurus, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Elionurus hirsutus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. Elionurus hirsutus can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
